app.name: JobLiberty
app.tagline: Samu aikin da ya dace tare da AI-powered amincewa.
app.mission: Taimaka wa masu neman aikin Afirka su buɗe damar aiki ta hanyar AI.
app.vision: Yin jagora na aikin hankali a ga kowa.

auth.verifyEmailDesc: Mun aika muku da hanyar tabbatarwa zuwa imel ɗinku. Don Allah duba akwatin saƙonku.
auth.resetInstructions: Shigar da imel ɗinka kuma za mu aika muku umarnin sake saita kalmar sirri.

landing.heroSubtitle: Ƙarfafa masu neman aikin Najeriya da Afirka tare da binciken resume na AI, daidaita aiki, da jagorar aiki na musamman.

features.title: Duk abin da kuke buƙata don samun matsayin mafarki

resumeAnalysis.title: Binciken Resume na AI
resumeAnalysis.desc: Samu bayani nan take game da ƙwarewa, gogewa, da dacewar ATS.

jobMatching.title: Daidaita Aikin Mai Hankali
jobMatching.desc: Gano ayyukan da suka dace sosai tare da gogewa da burin ku.

skillGap.title: Binciken Rago na Fasaha
skillGap.desc: Gano ƙwarewar da aka rasa kuma sami shawarwari na koyo na musamman.

interviewPrep.title: Shirye-shiryen Hira
interviewPrep.desc: Yi aiki tare da tambayoyi masu dacewa kuma sami ra'ayin AI.

careerRoadmap.title: Hanyar Aiki
careerRoadmap.desc: Gano matakai masu bayyana don isa ga matsayin da kuke so.

opportunityMode.title: Yanayin Damar
opportunityMode.desc: Duba yadda ƙananan gyare-gyare za su iya ƙara yawan dacewar ku.

step1.title: Ɗauki resume ɗinka
step1.desc: Ɗauki CV ɗinka a cikin tsarin PDF. AI ɗinmu zai bincike shi a cikin daƙiƙa.

step2.title: Samu cikakken bincike
step2.desc: Samu cikakkun bayanan ATS, rarrabuwar ƙwarewa, da shawarwari.

step3.title: Gano damar da suka dace
step3.desc: Bincika ayyukan da aka tsara tare da adadin dacewa da bayanan ƙwarewa.

step4.title: Ɗauki mataki & girma
step4.desc: Biya tsare-tsaren koyo na musamman, shirya don hirarraki, da bin diddigin ci gaba.

testimonials.title: An ƙaunace shi da masu neman aikin a duk faɗin Afirka

t1.quote: JobLiberty ya taimaka mini gano rago a resume na da ban sani ba. Na samu aikin farko a kamfanin fintech a cikin makonni 6.
t1.name: Aisha Bello

t2.quote: A matsayina na memba na NYSC, wannan kayan aikin ya ba ni ƙarfin zuciya da bayanan da na buƙata don neman ayyuka. Na samu hirarraki 3 a cikin mako ɗaya.
t2.name: Chinedu Okoro

t3.quote: Yanayin Damar yana da hikima. Ya nuna mini ainihin ƙwarewar da zan ƙara don daga 63% zuwa 91% dacewa.
t3.name: Fatima Ibrahim

faq.title: Tambayoyin da aka fi yawan yi
faq.a1: Ee, fasaloli na asali ciki har da binciken resume da daidaita aiki na asali kyauta ne. Fasaloli na musamman za su kasance ba da jimawa ba.
faq.q2: Wadanne harsuna ne aka goyi baya?
faq.a2: Mun goyi bayan Ingilishi, Hausa, Yoruba, da Igbo cikakke. Za ku iya canza harshe a kowane lokaci a cikin saituna ko navbar.
faq.q3: Bayanan resume na sirri ne da amintacce?
faq.a3: Hakika. Ana binciken resume ɗinku a gida kuma ba a adana shi ba tare da izinin ku ba. Duk bayanai an ɓoye su kuma za ku iya share su a kowane lokaci.
faq.a4: An horar da samfuran AI ɗinmu akan bayanan kasuwar Najeriya da Afirka. Daidaito ya dogara da ƙwarewa, gogewa, da mahimmancin wuri. Matsakaicin gamsuwar mai amfani ya wuce 87%.

cta.title: Shirya don buɗe damar aikinku?
cta.subtitle: Haɗu da dubunnan masu neman aikin Afirka suna amfani da AI don samun ayyuka mafi kyau cikin sauri.

upload.title: Ɗauki Resume ɗinka
